key_evidence: AP investigation (May 27): ICE detainee suicides at 22-year record high — 10 deaths since Jan 2025; 7 this fiscal year vs. typical 0-1 baseline
ICE detainee population spiked ~50% to ~60,000 under Trump second term
Systemic care failures documented: distress signals ignored, mental health treatment delayed, at-risk detainees unmonitored
9 of 10 victims Hispanic men, average age 32, in custody less than one month
HRW May 22 corroboration: ICE oversight gutted, detention profoundly harmful to mental health

events.label: AP investigation: ICE detainee suicides at 22-year high; systemic failures of care documented

methodology_note: Sub-5pt composite delta justified by dimension specificity. EQU enters dimension-Critical at 17.5 (first such entry for US). Apply conservatively anchored to preserve room before composite Critical boundary (20.0) which is 3.4pt below.
